name: Grok 2 Image MCP Server
what_it_does: Grok 2 Image MCP server enabling AI agents to generate images using xAI's Grok 2 image generation API (powered by Aurora/Flux models) — creating images from text prompts and integrating xAI's image generation capabilities into agent-driven creative and content workflows.
use_cases: Generating images from text prompts in creative content agents
Creating visual assets for presentations from content production agents
Building image generation into coding and design workflow agents
Rapid prototyping of visual concepts from design agents
Generating illustrations for documentation from technical writing agents
Exploring xAI's Aurora model capabilities from AI research agents
not_for: Image editing or inpainting (Grok 2 is text-to-image only)
High-volume production (xAI rate limits and costs apply)
Teams preferring Stability AI, DALL-E, or Midjourney APIs
best_when: An agent needs image generation via xAI's Grok 2 API — particularly for teams already using Grok for text and wanting unified xAI ecosystem access.
avoid_when: You need image editing, fine-tuned models, or have existing DALL-E/Stability AI integrations — use those dedicated MCPs.

auth.notes: xAI API key required. Available from console.x.ai. API key passed via environment variable.

pricing.free_tier_limits: xAI API: free credits for new accounts
pricing.paid_tiers: xAI image generation: usage-based pricing per image
pricing.notes: xAI API has usage-based pricing. New accounts receive free credits. Community MCP is free.

performance.rate_limits: xAI API rate limits apply (account-tier dependent)

known_agent_gotchas: xAI API key required — must register at console.x.ai
Image generation latency is high (3-15 seconds per image) — plan for async patterns
Community MCP — xAI API changes may break functionality without warning
Rate limits and costs apply — monitor xAI usage dashboard
Generated images may expire — download/store if needed for long-term use
xAI content policy applies — certain prompt types will be rejected
agent_readiness.security_notes: xAI API over HTTPS. Store API key as environment variable. Community MCP. Generated images sent to xAI servers. xAI content policy enforced.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. xAI API key. Community MCP. Prompts and outputs sent to xAI. Store key as env var.
